response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role demands embedded LAN-switch firmware development with strong C on UNIX, Linux kernel modification, networking security stacks (MACsec, 802.1X), and native-level Japanese — none of which are evident in the resume. The C/C++ exposure at National Instruments was brief (~6 months) and over a decade old, and there is no indication of Japanese language ability or embedded networking security work.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across diverse domains and stacks
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Comfortable with Linux environments, Docker, and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated — hard requirement for the role
No demonstrated experience with embedded firmware, LAN-switch security, MACsec, 802.1X, or Linux kernel modification
Primary recent expertise is web/cloud (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS), not C-based embedded UNIX development

key_factors.factor: Lacks embedded networking and security domain experience
Minimal recent C/UNIX and Linux kernel work
